name: GH_Parser
summary: Provides parsing methods for the Grasshopper Markdown flavour.

methods.name: IsChapterHeaderLine
methods.summary: Test whether a line represents a chapter header underline. Chapter header underlines contain at least 4 consecutive equals symbols preceded or followed by any amount of white space.

returns.doc: True if the line is considered to be a chapter header underline.

methods.name: IsCommentLine
methods.summary: Test whether a line is a comment. Commented lines begin with double slashes (//) and are ignored during parsing.

params.name: line
params.doc: Line to test. If you supply a multi-line string, death's too good for you.

returns.doc: True if the line is a comment line.

methods.name: IsLinkLine(String)
methods.summary: Test whether a line represents a referenced link target. Note; this is a quick check. The link might still be invalid, use the IsLinkLine overload to include validity checks.

returns.doc: True if the line is a referenced link.

methods.name: IsLinkLine(String, String, String, String)
methods.signature: public static bool IsLinkLine(string line, out string linkId, out string linkTarget, out string linkTooltip)
methods.summary: Test whether a line represents a referenced link target.

returns.doc: True if the line is a referenced link.

methods.name: IsListLine
methods.summary: Test whether a line contains a list item.

returns.doc: True if the line contains a list item.

methods.name: IsParagraphHeaderLine
methods.summary: Test whether a line represents a paragraph header underline. Paragraph header underlines contain at least 4 consecutive dashes preceded or followed by any amount of white space.

returns.doc: True if the line is considered to be a paragraph header underline.

methods.name: IsQuoteLine
methods.summary: Test whether a line is a block quote line. Block quotes start with a larger than symbol.

returns.doc: True if the line is a block quote.

methods.name: StringToFragment
methods.summary: Parse a block of text and return it as an interpreted IGH_Fragment.

properties.name: Whitespace
properties.summary: Gets an array of characters that are considered to be whitespace. At the moment, this array contains the space char and the tab char, it does not contain feeds or breaks.
